steps.title: Translate the axes
steps.content: Each dot represents one pregnant beaver. The $x$-coordinate is the beaver's weight in pounds, and the $y$-coordinate is the number of offspring that beaver produced.

steps.title: Read the point for 40 pounds
steps.content: Find $40$ on the horizontal weight axis. The dot at that weight is at height $5$, so the coordinate is $(40,5)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: A $40$-pound beaver produced $5$ offspring. That matches choice A.
